modules.module_title: Fashion Design Ka Parichay aur Itihaas

questions.question: Fashion design mein 'silhouette' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Garment ka overall outline ya shape
options.B: Fabric ka color pattern
options.C: Design mein use ki gayi embroidery

questions.explanation: Silhouette ek garment ka overall outline ya shape hota hai, jo uski pehchan banata hai.

questions.question: Haute Couture kis cheez se related hai?

options.B: Custom-fitted, handmade high fashion

questions.explanation: Haute Couture custom-fitted, handmade high fashion garments ko refer karta hai, jo high-quality fabrics aur intricate details ke saath banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Fashion cycle ke kis stage mein ek trend mass market tak pahunchta hai aur widespread ho jaata hai?

options.B: Rise stage

questions.explanation: Culmination stage mein ek trend apni peak par hota hai aur mass market mein sabse zyada popular ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Fashion designers typically apna inspiration kahan se lete hain?

options.B: Sirf previous fashion trends se

questions.explanation: Fashion designers apni inspiration art, culture, nature, historical periods, current events aur kai anya sources se lete hain.

questions.question: Ek 'fashion forecasting' agency ka main role kya hai?

options.A: Past fashion trends ko document karna
options.B: Future fashion trends aur consumer preferences ko predict karna

questions.explanation: Fashion forecasting agencies future trends, colors, fabrics, aur styles ko predict karti hain, jisse designers aur retailers aage ki planning kar sakein.

questions.question: Early 20th century mein, kaun se designer ko 'Little Black Dress' (LBD) popular karne ka credit diya jaata hai, jo aaj bhi ek timeless classic hai?

options.B: Elsa Schiaparelli

questions.explanation: Coco Chanel ne 1920s mein Little Black Dress ko popular kiya, jo simplicity aur elegance ka symbol ban gaya.

questions.question: Prêt-à-Porter ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ready-to-wear clothing

questions.explanation: Prêt-à-Porter French term hai jiska matlab 'ready-to-wear' hota hai, yaani standard sizes mein mass-produced clothing.

questions.question: Fashion design mein 'collection' term kya signify karta hai?

options.A: Ek designer ke favorite garments ka personal collection
options.B: Ek season ke liye designers द्वारा create kiye gaye coordinated garments ka group

questions.explanation: Ek collection ek season (e.g., Spring/Summer, Autumn/Winter) ke liye ek designer द्वारा create kiye gaye coordinated garments aur accessories ka group hota hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa design element ek garment mein visual interest aur structure add karta hai?

options.B: Darts

questions.explanation: Darts fabric mein fold hote hain jo garment ko body ke curves ke according shape dete hain, aur visual interest bhi add karte hain.

questions.question: Fashion industry mein 'trendsetter' kaun hota hai?

options.A: Jo existing trends ko follow karta hai
options.B: Jo naye trends shuru karta hai aur unhe popular banata hai
options.C: Jo sirf basic garments design karta hai
options.D: Jo fashion magazines publish karta hai

questions.explanation: Trendsetter woh individuals ya groups hote hain jo naye styles aur fashion ko introduce karte hain aur unhe mainstream banate hain.

questions.question: 1950s mein 'New Look' ko kis designer ne introduce kiya tha, jo voluminous skirts aur cinched waists ke liye jaana jaata hai?

options.B: Pierre Cardin

questions.explanation: Christian Dior ne 1947 mein 'New Look' collection launch kiya tha, jo wartime austerity ke baad ek revolutionary feminine silhouette tha.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'mood board' banana kyun important hai?

options.B: To visualize and communicate design concept and inspiration

questions.explanation: Mood board design concept, colors, textures aur overall inspiration ko visually communicate karne ke liye ek powerful tool hai.

questions.question: Sustainable fashion ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Fast fashion trends ko promote karna
options.B: Environmental aur social responsibility ko dhyan mein rakhkar clothing produce karna

questions.explanation: Sustainable fashion manufacturing process ke environmental aur social impact ko minimize karne par focus karta hai.

questions.question: Fabric drape ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fabric ka weight
options.C: Fabric ka kaise fall ya hang hona

questions.explanation: Drape fabric ki ability hai ki woh body par kaise gracefully fall ya hang hota hai.

questions.question: Fashion design mein 'CAD' ka kya use hai?

options.A: Garment cutting ke liye manual methods
options.B: Computer-Aided Design (CAD) software ka use karke designs create aur modify karna

questions.explanation: CAD (Computer-Aided Design) software designers ko digital format mein designs create, modify aur visualize karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Viktor & Rolf, Iris van Herpen jaise designers kis type ki fashion ke liye jaane jaate hain, jahan innovation aur artistic expression bahut high hoti hai?

options.B: Avant-garde Fashion

questions.explanation: Avant-garde fashion traditional norms ko challenge karti hai aur experimental, innovative designs par focus karti hai jo art aur fashion ko blend karte hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion portfolio mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Design sketches, technical flats, mood boards aur final garment images

questions.explanation: Ek fashion portfolio ek designer ke best works ka collection hota hai, jo uski creativity aur technical skills ko showcase karta hai.

questions.question: Design ke elements mein se kaun sa element ek garment ki 'form' ko define karta hai?

options.B: Texture

questions.explanation: Shape aur silhouette ek garment ki form ko define karte hain, yaani woh body par kaise dikhta hai aur uski overall structure kya hai.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'balance' achieve karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Design elements (shapes, colors, textures) ko visually evenly distribute karna

questions.explanation: Balance design ka ek principle hai jahan visual weight ko evenly distribute kiya jaata hai, chahe woh symmetrical ho ya asymmetrical.

questions.question: Kaun sa color scheme 'harmonious' aur 'calming' effect deta hai?

options.B: Analogous (adjacent colors)

questions.explanation: Analogous colors color wheel par ek doosre ke bagal mein hote hain aur ek soothing, harmonious effect create karte hain.

questions.question: Ek design mein 'rhythm' kaise create kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi element ko use karke
options.B: Elements (lines, shapes, colors) ke repetition, gradation ya alternation se visual movement create karke
options.C: Sabhi elements ko randomly place karke
options.D: Ek hi color scheme use karke

questions.explanation: Rhythm design elements ke repetition, gradation ya alternation se visual movement aur flow create karta hai, jo viewers ki aankhon ko design mein guide karta hai.

questions.question: Fashion design mein 'emphasis' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Design ke har part ko equally important banana
options.B: Design ke ek particular area ko focal point banana, jo sabse zyada attention grab kare
options.C: Design ko simple aur understated rakhna

questions.explanation: Emphasis design ka woh principle hai jahan ek area ya element ko prominent banaya jaata hai, jisse woh focal point ban jaata hai.

questions.question: Vertical lines ek garment mein kya illusion create karti hain?

options.B: Taller aur slimmer appearance

questions.explanation: Vertical lines aankhon ko upar aur neeche move karne ke liye guide karti hain, jisse ek taller aur slimmer appearance ka illusion hota hai.

questions.question: Warm colors (e.g., red, orange, yellow) generally kya effect dete hain?

options.B: Cool aur distant

questions.explanation: Warm colors energetic, bold, inviting aur passionate feelings evoke karte hain, aur visually aage badhte hue dikhte hain.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'texture' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fabric ka weight
options.C: Fabric ki surface quality (how it feels or looks)

questions.explanation: Texture fabric ki surface quality hoti hai, jo touch (haptic) aur sight (visual) se perceive ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'proportion' maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf fabric waste kam karne ke liye
options.B: Design ke different parts ke beech pleasing aur harmonious size relationship ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Garment ko zyada shiny banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Proportion design ke different parts ke beech ke size relationships ko refer karta hai. Good proportion design ko balanced aur aesthetically pleasing banata hai.

questions.question: Monochromatic color scheme mein kaun se colors use hote hain?

options.A: Ek hi color ke different shades, tints aur tones
options.B: Color wheel par opposite colors

questions.explanation: Monochromatic scheme mein ek single color ke variations use hote hain, jo ek sophisticated aur cohesive look provide karte hain.

questions.question: Horizontal lines ek garment mein kya effect deti hain?

options.B: Wider aur shorter appearance

questions.explanation: Horizontal lines aankhon ko side-to-side move karne ke liye guide karti hain, jisse ek wider aur shorter appearance ka illusion hota hai.

questions.question: Design mein 'unity' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Sabhi design elements ka ek cohesive aur complete whole ki tarah ek saath kaam karna
options.C: Sirf ek hi color use karna
options.D: Bahut sare contrasting elements use karna

questions.explanation: Unity design ka principle hai jahan sabhi elements ek saath milkar ek cohesive aur harmonious look create karte hain.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'contrast' kaise create kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Similar colors aur textures use karke
options.B: Opposite colors, textures, shapes ya lines ko juxtapose karke

questions.explanation: Contrast design mein visual interest aur drama add karta hai by using opposing elements, jaise light/dark, rough/smooth, large/small.

questions.question: Golden Ratio (approximately 1.618) ka fashion design mein kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf fabric cutting ke liye use hota hai
options.B: Garment ke proportions aur aesthetics ko guide karne ke liye use hota hai, jo naturally pleasing dikhte hain
options.C: Fabric dye ki quantity calculate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Golden Ratio ek mathematical concept hai jo aesthetically pleasing proportions create karne mein help karta hai, jisse designs naturally balanced aur harmonious dikhte hain.

questions.question: Cool colors (e.g., blue, green, purple) generally kya effect dete hain?

options.B: Calm, soothing aur distant

questions.explanation: Cool colors calm, soothing, peaceful feelings evoke karte hain aur visually peeche hathte hue dikhte hain.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'repetition' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Rhythm, unity aur visual interest create karna
options.D: Sirf ek hi element ko highlight karna

questions.explanation: Repetition design elements ko repeat karke rhythm, unity aur visual interest create karta hai.

questions.question: Analogous color scheme mein colors kahan se liye jaate hain?

options.A: Color wheel par ek doosre ke opposite
options.B: Color wheel par teen evenly spaced
options.C: Color wheel par ek doosre ke bagal mein

questions.explanation: Analogous colors color wheel par ek doosre ke bagal mein hote hain aur ek harmonious aur cohesive look create karte hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa fabric natural fibre se banta hai aur uski breathability ke liye jaana jaata hai?

options.B: Nylon

questions.explanation: Cotton ek natural plant fibre hai jo apni softness, absorbency aur breathability ke liye popular hai.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'thread count' kya indicate karti hai?

options.B: Fabric ki softness aur durability

questions.explanation: Thread count ek square inch mein horizontal aur vertical threads ki total number hoti hai. Higher thread count usually softer aur more durable fabric ko indicate karti hai.

questions.question: Synthetic fibre ka ek example kaun sa hai?

options.B: Wool

questions.explanation: Polyester ek man-made synthetic fibre hai jo apni durability, wrinkle-resistance aur quick-drying properties ke liye jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa fabric apni unique luster, smooth feel aur high absorbency ke liye jaana jaata hai, aur protein fibre se banta hai?

options.B: Silk

questions.explanation: Silk ek luxurious natural protein fibre hai jo silkworms se nikalta hai, aur apni softness, strength aur unique sheen ke liye prized hai.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'GSM' (Grams per Square Meter) kya define karti hai?

options.B: Fabric ka weight

questions.explanation: GSM fabric ke weight ko describe karta hai, jo uski thickness aur density ko indicate karta hai.

questions.question: Denim kis type ka fabric hai?

options.B: Heavy cotton twill fabric

questions.explanation: Denim ek sturdy cotton twill fabric hai jo apni durability aur jeans banane ke liye jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: Rayon ko 'regenerated cellulosic fibre' kyun kaha jaata hai?

options.A: Kyuki yeh plastic se banta hai
options.B: Kyuki yeh natural cellulose (wood pulp) se banta hai, lekin chemical process se modify kiya jaata hai
options.C: Kyuki yeh animals se milta hai
options.D: Kyuki yeh recycled bottles se banta hai

questions.explanation: Rayon natural cellulose se banta hai, lekin usko chemical treatment se process kiya jaata hai, isliye yeh synthetic aur natural ke beech aata hai.

questions.question: Linen fabric kis plant se banta hai?

options.B: Flax plant

questions.explanation: Linen flax plant ke fibres se banta hai aur apni strength, absorbency aur cool feel ke liye jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: Fabric 'pilling' kya hota hai aur isse kaise prevent kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Fabric ka color fade hona; isse gentle washing se prevent kar sakte hain.
options.B: Fabric surface par chote-chote balls ka banna; isse low-abrasion care aur fabric softener se prevent kar sakte hain.
options.C: Fabric ka shrink hona; isse cold water wash se prevent kar sakte hain.
options.D: Fabric ka stretch hona; isse dry cleaning se prevent kar sakte hain.

questions.explanation: Pilling fabric surface par chote-chote fibre balls ka banna hai, jo friction se hota hai. Gentle washing, low-abrasion care, aur fabric softener isse kam karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa weave pattern apni distinctive diagonal rib lines ke liye jaana jaata hai?

options.B: Satin weave

questions.explanation: Twill weave mein filling threads warp threads ke upar aur neeche diagonal pattern mein jaate hain, jo iski signature diagonal rib create karta hai (e.g., denim).

questions.question: Wool kis type ka fibre hai?

options.B: Synthetic

questions.explanation: Wool sheep aur anya animals (jaise goats, alpacas) se milta hai aur ek natural protein fibre hai, jo apni warmth aur resilience ke liye jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'stretchability' kis type ke fabrics mein sabse zyada hoti hai?

options.B: Non-woven fabrics

questions.explanation: Knit fabrics, jaise jersey, interlocking loops se bante hain, jo unhe inherent stretch dete hain, woven fabrics ke comparison mein.

questions.question: Chiffon fabric kis feature ke liye jaana jaata hai?

options.B: Sheer, lightweight aur flowy

questions.explanation: Chiffon ek sheer, lightweight fabric hai jo apni delicate drape aur slightly crinkled texture ke liye jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: Fabric 'count' ya 'fineness' ko measure karne ke liye kaun sa unit use hota hai?

options.B: Denier (for synthetic) ya Micron (for wool)

questions.explanation: Denier synthetic fibres ki fineness ko measure karta hai (higher denier = thicker yarn), jabki Micron wool fibres ki fineness ko measure karta hai (lower micron = finer wool).

questions.question: Organic cotton aur conventional cotton mein kya major difference hai?

options.A: Organic cotton zyada costly hota hai.
options.B: Organic cotton ko harmful pesticides aur synthetic fertilizers ke bina cultivate kiya jaata hai.
options.C: Organic cotton zyada durable hota hai.
options.D: Conventional cotton zyada soft hota hai.

questions.explanation: Organic cotton environmental-friendly methods se grow kiya jaata hai, jo soil health ko maintain karte hain aur water pollution kam karte hain, conventional cotton ke chemical-intensive methods ke opposite.

questions.question: Silk ki natural sheen kis wajah se hoti hai?

options.B: Uske triangular prism-like structure se jo light ko reflect karta hai

questions.explanation: Silk fibres ka triangular prism-like cross-section light ko different angles se reflect karta hai, jisse uski unique luster aur sheen milti hai.

questions.question: Voile fabric kis type ka hota hai?

options.B: Sheer, lightweight aur crisp

questions.explanation: Voile ek sheer, lightweight fabric hai jo apni crispness aur semi-transparent appearance ke liye jaana jaata hai, often cotton ya polyester se banta hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'croquis' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek model figure ka basic sketch jo fashion designs draw karne ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: Croquis ek basic outline ya template figure hota hai, jiske upar designers apne clothing designs draw karte hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion illustration mein 'rendering' ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Design ko realistic aur visually appealing banane ke liye color, texture aur shadows add karna
options.D: Fabric ke cost ko calculate karna

questions.explanation: Rendering illustration mein depth, realism aur visual appeal add karta hai, jisse fabric ki drape, texture aur garment ka overall look clear ho.

questions.question: Technical flat sketch kya show karta hai?

options.A: Garment ko model par pehna hua
options.B: Garment ko flat-laid position mein, front aur back view se, construction details ke saath

questions.explanation: Technical flat sketch garment ke exact construction details, seams, stitches, aur proportions ko flat, 2D view mein dikhata hai, production ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Ek fashion illustration mein 'figure proportion' ko maintain karna kyun critical hai?

options.A: Sirf artwork ko zyada attractive banane ke liye
options.B: Garment design ko realistic aur wearable dikhane ke liye, aur body par uski drape ko accurately represent karne ke liye
options.C: Illustration ko jaldi complete karne ke liye
options.D: Color scheme ko highlight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Correct figure proportion garment ko body par realistically drape hone aur fit hone ka illusion deta hai, jisse design ki practicality aur appeal badhti hai.

questions.question: Watercolors fashion illustration mein kis effect ke liye use hote hain?

options.B: Soft, translucent aur flowing effects

questions.explanation: Watercolors apni translucent quality aur ability to create soft washes aur blends ke liye jaana jaata hai, jo fluid aur ethereal effects dete hain.

questions.question: Fashion sketch mein 'line quality' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf sketch ko neat rakhne ke liye
options.B: Movement, texture aur form ko convey karne ke liye
options.C: Sketch ko colorful banane ke liye
options.D: Sketch ko small banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Line quality (thick, thin, broken, smooth) sketch mein dynamism, texture aur garment ke structure ko effectively communicate karti hai.

questions.question: 'Flats' draw karte waqt kaun sa tool sabse zaroori hai precise lines aur shapes ke liye?

options.B: Ruler aur French curve

questions.explanation: Ruler aur French curve technical flats mein straight lines aur smooth curves banane ke liye essential hain, jisse precision maintain hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek designer ko apne portfolio mein different types ke croquis kyun include karne chahiye?

options.B: Apni versatility aur different body types par designs create karne ki ability show karne ke liye
options.C: Portfolio ko lamba banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Different croquis use karke designer apni versatility demonstrate kar sakta hai aur show kar sakta hai ki woh various body shapes aur poses par design kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein digital tools (jaise Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop) ka kya advantage hai traditional methods par?

options.B: Zyada flexibility, easy editing, color palette experiments aur quick revisions allow karte hain
options.D: Woh sirf basic sketches ke liye use hote hain

questions.explanation: Digital tools efficiency badhate hain, designers ko easily changes karne, multiple variations explore karne aur professional-looking illustrations create karne ki suvidha dete hain.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'highlights' aur 'shadows' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Garment ko 3-dimensional effect dena aur fabric ki drape aur texture ko enhance karna

questions.explanation: Highlights aur shadows light source ko simulate karte hain, jisse garment ko form aur depth milti hai, aur fabric ki drape visually clear hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'swatch board' banana kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf fabric ko store karne ke liye
options.B: Selected fabrics, trims aur colors ko visually organize aur present karne ke liye
options.C: Sketches ko hide karne ke liye
options.D: Design ki history track karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Swatch board ek collection ke fabric, trim aur color choices ko ek jagah par show karta hai, jisse design concept ko cohesive banaya ja sake.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'marker rendering' kis type ke effect ke liye popular hai?

options.B: Bold, vibrant colors aur sharp contrasts

questions.explanation: Markers apni vibrant colors, smooth application aur ability to create sharp contrasts ke liye jaane jaate hain, jo impactful illustrations ke liye acche hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion illustration mein 'garment details' (jaise buttons, zippers, pockets) ko accurately draw karna kyun essential hai?

options.A: Sirf illustration ko zyada complex banane ke liye
options.B: Garment ki functional aur aesthetic aspects ko clearly communicate karne ke liye
options.D: Illustration ko artistic banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Accurate details garment ki functionality aur final look ko convey karte hain, jo production team ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'drapery' ko kaise effectively portray kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Light aur shadow ke use se fabric ke folds aur creases ko draw karke

questions.explanation: Drapery ko effectively portray karne ke liye light aur shadow ka judicious use kiya jaata hai, jisse fabric ke folds aur creases realistic dikhte hain aur garment ki texture aur movement reveal hoti hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'perspective' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Illustration ko 3-dimensional depth aur realism dena, jisse garment space mein accurately dikhe

questions.explanation: Perspective illustration ko depth aur realism deta hai, jisse garment aur figure space mein sahi tarah se dikhte hain, especially jab multiple figures ya complex poses hon.

questions.question: Ek fashion illustration mein 'accessories' (jaise jewelry, bags, shoes) ko include karna kyun faydemand hai?

options.A: Sirf drawing ko fill karne ke liye
options.B: Overall look ko complete karne aur design concept ko enhance karne ke liye
options.C: Accessories ki sales badhane ke liye
options.D: Illustration ko zyada complicated banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Accessories design concept ko complete karte hain aur overall styling ko enhance karte hain, jisse ek cohesive look banta hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'mixed media' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi medium use karna
options.B: Drawing mein do ya do se zyada different art media (jaise markers, colored pencils, watercolors) ka use karna
options.D: Sirf black and white sketches banana

questions.explanation: Mixed media designers ko different textures, effects aur depths create karne ki flexibility deta hai, jisse illustrations zyada rich aur expressive bante hain.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'seam allowance' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Fabric ka woh extra part jo stitching ke liye use hota hai aur seam ko secure karta hai
options.C: Garment ko size adjust karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko shrink hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Seam allowance fabric ka woh extra margin hota hai jo pattern pieces ke edges ke bahar choda jaata hai, jisse unhe stitch kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Kaun sa seam ek garment mein sabse common aur versatile hai?

options.B: Flat felled seam

questions.explanation: Plain seam sabse basic aur widely used seam hai, jahan do fabric pieces ko right sides together rakhkar stitch kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Grainline' ka pattern piece par kya significance hai?

options.A: Sirf pattern ko rotate karne ke liye
options.B: Fabric par pattern piece ko kaise align karna hai, taaki garment sahi se drape ho aur stretch kare

questions.explanation: Grainline fabric ke warp (lengthwise) grain ke parallel align hoti hai, jo garment ke drape aur fit ko affect karti hai.

questions.question: Ek 'notched collar' ko construct karte waqt sabse challenging step kya hota hai?

options.B: Collar aur lapel ke corners ko precisely turn aur press karna, taaki sharp points banein

questions.explanation: Notched collar mein sharp points aur smooth curves banane ke liye precise clipping, trimming, aur pressing ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Fusible interfacing ka kya use hai garment construction mein?

options.B: Fabric ko stiffness, support aur shape provide karna

questions.explanation: Fusible interfacing ek fabric layer hai jo heat-activated adhesive ke saath aata hai, aur garment ke specific areas ko structure aur support deta hai.

questions.question: Darts ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Garment ko body ke curves ke according shape dena

questions.explanation: Darts fabric ke folds hote hain jo garment ko 3D shape dete hain, jisse woh body par better fit ho.

questions.question: Hemming ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Garment ke edges ko raw chhod dena
options.B: Garment ke edges ko fold aur stitch karke ek neat finish dena
options.C: Garment ko size mein chota karna

questions.explanation: Hemming garment ke bottom edge ko finish karne ka process hai, jisse woh fray na ho aur neat dikhe.

questions.question: Sewing machine mein 'tension' setting ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Upper aur bobbin threads ke balance ko control karna, taaki stitch evenly bane

questions.explanation: Correct tension setting evenly formed stitches ke liye essential hai, jo fabric ko puckering ya looping se bachati hai.

questions.question: Ek 'pattern grading' technique ka kya objective hai?

options.B: Ek basic pattern ko different sizes mein systematically enlarge ya reduce karna

questions.explanation: Pattern grading ek established technique hai jisse ek master pattern ko consistent proportions maintain karte hue multiple sizes mein adapt kiya jaata hai, mass production ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool fabric ko accurately cut karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Fabric shears (kainchi)

questions.explanation: Fabric shears fabric ko clean aur precise cuts dene ke liye specifically designed hote hain.

questions.question: Basting stitch ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Fabric pieces ko temporarily hold karna final stitching se pehle

questions.explanation: Basting stitches long, loose stitches hote hain jo fabric ko temporary alignment mein rakhte hain, jisse fitting aur final stitching easy ho.

questions.question: Bias binding ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf straight edges ko finish karna
options.B: Curved edges ko clean aur flexible finish dena

questions.explanation: Bias binding fabric strips ko bias grain par cut karke banaya jaata hai, jisse woh curved edges par smoothly fit ho sake.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'understitching' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Facing ya lining ko roll hone se rokna, jisse garment ka edge neat aur crisp dikhe

questions.explanation: Understitching ek stitching technique hai jahan seam allowance ko facing ya lining ki taraf press karke, uske edge par stitch kiya jaata hai, jisse facing andar ki taraf roll na ho.

questions.question: Seam ripper ka kya use hai?

options.B: Stitches ko carefully remove karna

questions.explanation: Seam ripper ek small tool hai jiska use mistakes ko correct karne ya alterations karne ke liye stitches ko carefully remove karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Interlining ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Garment ko extra warmth, body ya opaqueness provide karna

questions.explanation: Interlining ek additional fabric layer hai jo main fabric aur lining ke beech mein use hoti hai, specific properties (jaise warmth, structure) add karne ke liye.

questions.question: Ek 'set-in sleeve' ko accurately attach karne mein sabse challenging aspect kya hai?

options.B: Sleeve cap ko armhole ke curve mein smoothly ease karna aur puckering avoid karna

questions.explanation: Set-in sleeve ki cap ko armhole ke curve mein smoothly ease karna demanding hota hai, jisse koi puckering na ho aur ek clean, professional finish mile.

questions.question: Fashion marketing mein 'target audience' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Customers ka specific group jise ek brand apne products ya services se appeal karna chahta hai

questions.explanation: Target audience woh specific demographic ya psychographic group hota hai jiske liye ek brand apne marketing efforts ko direct karta hai.

questions.question: Ek fashion brand ke liye 'branding' kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf logo design karne ke liye
options.B: Brand ki identity, values aur unique selling proposition ko establish karna, jisse woh competitors se alag dikhe
options.C: Products ko expensive banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Branding ek brand ki overall image aur perception ko create karta hai, jisse woh customers ke mind mein distinct aur memorable ban jaata hai.

questions.question: Fashion industry mein 'merchandising' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Products ko right time, right place, right quantity aur right price par customer tak pahunchana

questions.explanation: Merchandising ek strategic process hai jo product development, sourcing, pricing, aur display ko manage karta hai, taaki sales maximize ho sake.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'intellectual property' (IP) rights (jaise copyrights, trademarks) ko protect karna kyun critical hai?

options.B: Apne original designs ko copy hone se bachane aur apni creativity aur brand value ko secure karne ke liye
options.C: Apne designs ko share karne ke liye
options.D: Extra money earn karne ke liye

questions.explanation: IP rights designers ko apne unique creations par exclusive control dete hain, jisse unki designs ki copying aur unauthorized use se protection milti hai, aur unki creative investment secure rehti hai.

questions.question: Social media ka fashion marketing mein kya impact hai?

options.B: Brands ko wide audience tak pahunchne, engagement build karne aur trends create karne ka platform provide karna

questions.explanation: Social media platforms fashion brands ke liye ek powerful tool hain, jahan woh apne products showcase kar sakte hain, influencers ke saath collaborate kar sakte hain aur real-time customer feedback le sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'networking' kyun important hai?

options.B: Industry contacts banane, collaborations find karne aur career opportunities explore karne ke liye
options.C: Apne designs ko secret rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Networking fashion industry mein connections banane ka ek crucial aspect hai, jo mentorship, job opportunities aur business partnerships open karta hai.

questions.question: Fashion industry mein 'supply chain' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf finished garments ko store karna
options.B: Raw materials se lekar finished product tak pahunchne wale saare processes aur organizations ka network

questions.explanation: Supply chain mein sourcing raw materials, manufacturing, logistics, distribution, aur retailing jaise saare steps shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'portfolio review' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Feedback lene, apni skills showcase karne aur job ya internship opportunities secure karne ke liye
options.C: Apne designs ko copy karwane ke liye

questions.explanation: Portfolio review ek mauka hota hai jahan designers apne work ko industry professionals ko dikhate hain aur valuable feedback aur career opportunities receive karte hain.

questions.question: Fast fashion ke environmental aur social impacts kya hain?

options.B: High waste generation, overconsumption, water pollution aur unfair labor practices
options.C: Yeh consumers ke liye affordable clothing provide karta hai.
options.D: Yeh creativity ko promote karta hai.

questions.explanation: Fast fashion ke negative impacts mein rapid production cycle, low-quality garments, excessive water and chemical usage, aur garment workers ke liye poor working conditions shamil hain.

questions.question: E-commerce ka fashion industry par kya asar hua hai?

options.A: Sirf physical stores ko badhava dena
options.B: Global reach, 24/7 availability aur personalized shopping experience provide karna

questions.explanation: E-commerce ne fashion brands ko apne products ko global audience tak pahunchane, customers ko convenient shopping options dene, aur data-driven marketing strategies implement karne mein help ki hai.

questions.question: Ek 'tech pack' ka kya purpose hota hai fashion production mein?

options.A: Sirf design sketches ko store karna
options.B: Garment ke detailed specifications (measurements, fabrics, trims, construction, artworks) ko provide karna, jisse manufacturers use accurately produce kar sakein

questions.explanation: Tech pack manufacturing process ke liye ek comprehensive blueprint hota hai, jo design aur production teams ke beech communication ko streamline karta hai.

questions.question: Fashion brand ki 'USP' (Unique Selling Proposition) kya hoti hai?

options.B: Woh unique feature ya benefit jo brand ko competitors se alag banata hai

questions.explanation: USP woh specific quality ya benefit hota hai jo ek brand ko competitive market mein stand out karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Fashion industry mein 'circular economy' model ka kya objective hai?

options.B: Waste ko minimize karna aur resources ko recycle, reuse aur regenerate karke products ko unke lifecycle ke end mein value provide karna

questions.explanation: Circular economy fashion industry ko more sustainable banane par focus karti hai, jahan products ko design kiya jaata hai taaki unhe reuse, repair, ya recycle kiya ja sake, waste aur pollution kam ho.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'trend research' kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf past trends ko yaad rakhne ke liye
options.B: Future consumer preferences, colors, fabrics aur silhouettes ko identify karna, jisse relevant aur marketable designs create kiye ja sakein
options.C: Competitors ko copy karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Trend research designers ko market demands ke saath align rehne aur commercially successful collections create karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Fashion industry mein 'visual merchandising' ka kya impact hai?

options.B: Product display aur store layout ko optimize karna, jisse customers attract hon aur sales badhein

questions.explanation: Visual merchandising products ko aesthetically pleasing aur engaging tarike se present karta hai, jisse customer experience enhance hota hai aur purchase decisions influence hote hain.

questions.question: Ek 'ethical sourcing' policy ka fashion brand ke liye kya significance hai?

options.B: Raw materials aur labor ko responsible aur fair practices se acquire karna, environmental aur social impact ko minimize karte hue

questions.explanation: Ethical sourcing brands ko transparent aur socially responsible banata hai, worker rights, fair wages, aur environmental protection jaise factors ko prioritize karta hai, jo consumers ke liye increasingly important hai.
